mismatch_summary.notes: Legacy aggregate key: open-signal triage counts only; no tax or permit-enforcement semantics.

built_up_change_candidates.signal_summary: Elevated spectral change index with stable footprint sample (demo).

new_construction_candidate_areas.description: Cluster where footprint growth proxy and EO change align (demo only).

footprint_growth_summary.note: Footprint delta proxies require multi-temporal licensed stacks; this is a placeholder.

high_change_wards.review_rationale: Stacked open signals exceed demo triage threshold; schedule field context review.

evidence.notes: Demo triage only—verify seasonality, clouds, and informal mapping gaps before field deployment.

review_candidates.recommended_review_action: Schedule ward-level field context review; do not infer permit or tax status from remote signals alone.

data_quality_summary.confidence_note: Demo payload mixing synthetic EO and footprint samples; operational use prohibited.

active_warnings.message: Synthetic demo payload — do not use for operational enforcement, tax, or revenue decisions.
Spectral change can reflect vegetation, soil moisture, or clouds—not proof of construction legality.
Municipal property registries and internal permit feeds are not assumed in this open-data MVP path.
